nation: Fort Good Hope Dene Community Council
economic_notes: Council owns 100% of K'asho Got'ine Development Corporation, which in turn owns 24.9% of Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership. The Corporation pursues community economic development initiatives for Fort Good Hope, NWT. Audit was qualified because financial statements of Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership for year ended March 31, 2023 were not available.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to inability to obtain financial statements of Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership (24.9% owned through K'asho Got'ine Development Corporation) for year ended March 31, 2023. Audit report signed April 3, 2025 — nearly two years after fiscal year end. No budget figures were provided in the financial statements (shown as dashes). Contributions repayable of $23,834 to ISC for Professional Development and Institutional support. Receivable from related parties of $135,646 primarily from Charter Community of K'asho Got'ine. Council is economically dependent on government transfers. The province field is set to NT (Northwest Territories).
